title: cohniella jonesiana
intro: Cohniella jonesiana, also known as Jones' false honey fungus, is a species of fungus in the family Clavulinaceae. It is characterized by its bright orange to reddish-brown color and conical or cylindrical shape. Cohniella jonesiana is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and antifungal activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The herbal preparations of this fungus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide several health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-boosting effects.
